programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado
programme.desc: Venezuela is famous for its lost worlds, its forbidding mountains, huge swamps, and impenetrable jungles, all seemingly cut off in space and time. Yet each is linked, by the mighty river: the Orinoco, the rumoured route to El Dorado, city of gold.
programme.sub-title: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Pantanal: Brazil's Wild Heart
programme.desc: Every year the Pantanal is drowned by immense floods, and then suffer severe drought. Yet, while people struggle, the Pantanal hosts some of the greatest gatherings of animals on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: The Andes: World in the Clouds
programme.desc: The longest chain of mountains in the world, the Andes run the length of western South America and dictate the climate for the whole continent. They include some of the highest peaks outside the Himalayas.
programme.sub-title: The Andes: World in the Clouds

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Amazon: One Jungle, Many Worlds
programme.desc: The Amazon is the largest rainforest in the world, and the richest ecosystem on earth. This film uncovers what makes the Amazon such a powerhouse of evolution; how it has come to home a third of all species on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Patagonia is a place of extremes  of vast ice fields and snow-capped mountains; of windswept deserts, and violent oceans. Survival here means being tough enough to cope with brutal winters, and canny enough to exploit brief seasons of plenty.
programme.sub-title: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado
programme.desc: Venezuela is famous for its lost worlds, its forbidding mountains, huge swamps, and impenetrable jungles, all seemingly cut off in space and time. Yet each is linked, by the mighty river: the Orinoco, the rumoured route to El Dorado, city of gold.
programme.sub-title: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Pantanal: Brazil's Wild Heart
programme.desc: Every year the Pantanal is drowned by immense floods, and then suffer severe drought. Yet, while people struggle, the Pantanal hosts some of the greatest gatherings of animals on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: The Andes: World in the Clouds
programme.desc: The longest chain of mountains in the world, the Andes run the length of western South America and dictate the climate for the whole continent. They include some of the highest peaks outside the Himalayas.
programme.sub-title: The Andes: World in the Clouds

programme.title: Wildest India: Thar Desert: Sacred Sands
programme.desc: Covering 200,000 km sq, India's Thar desert is one of the harshest places on Earth. Desiccating winds and near permanent drought has earned this unforgiving land another name: the region of death.

programme.title: Wildest India: Ganges: River of Life
programme.desc: Then watch, the longest river in India, The Ganges. It's a lifeline to wild animals, from rhinoceros and river dolphins to otters and gharials.

programme.title: Wildest India: The Himalayas: Surviving the Summits
programme.desc: The Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India. he Himalayas' rugged highlands offer little direct refuge to humans, in the shadow below, over a billion people in India rely on the mountains for survival.

programme.title: Wildest India: Western Ghats: Monsoon Mountains
programme.desc: See how the Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India.The Himalayas' highlands offer little direct refuge to humans. /Then, learn about the western Ghats. A spine of mountains that lay claim to being one of the most bio-diverse places in the world.

programme.title: Wildest India: India's Lost World
programme.desc: North-east India is an anthropological paradise; there is no other place on Earth with so many different ethnic groups. The forest are filled with mysterious tribes whose lives are dictated by the rain and the seasonal fruits of the forest.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Okavango: Water in the Desert
programme.desc: The Okavango Delta, a huge emerald oasis in the burning heart of the Kalahari desert, is fed by the Okavango River and this perpetual cycle of wet and dry is the lifeblood of this extraordinary natural Eden.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Namibia: Sands of Time
programme.desc: Namibia is an arid, rough land. However, it has been inhabited for thousands of years, by people as well as animals, and shows no sign of losing popularity with either.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Ngorongoro: Born of Fire
programme.desc: Ngorongoro is thought to have formed about 2.5 million years ago from a large volcano, whose cone collapsed inward after a major eruption. This fertile land is full of wildlife, from cunning hyena and proud lions to vast herds of wildebeest and elephants.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Zambezi: Wild Water
programme.desc: The Zambezi is one of Africa's most influential rivers. It supports some of the continent's most spectacular wildlife. However, the Zambezi's long and winding journey destroys, as well as creates.

programme.title: Buried
programme.desc: Paul Conroy wakes up six feet underground with no idea of who put him there or why. Buried with only a cell phone and lighter, his worst enemies are bad reception, a rapidly draining battery, and low oxygen. Paul only has ninety minutes to be rescued.

15 months after being stabbed 9 times by a student at work as a high school teacher in NYC, Mr. Garfield is working in LA as a substitute teacher come full-time. He refuses to be a victim anymore. Feat: Samuel L Jackson.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer is just your average, undercover super-assassin. When he meets Jen, he finds true love. But a picture-perfect marriage won't save Spencer from becoming a target himself. Now Spencer and Jen are on the run for their lives.

programme.title: Bigger
programme.desc: A rags-to-riches biopic of visionary Joe Weider, set in the world of fitness. Brothers Joe & Ben Weider were the architects of muscle.

programme.title: From Time To Time
programme.desc: In 1940s England, Tolly is sent to the country house of his grandmother whilst his mother searches for his missing father. Tolly soon finds that he can pass through time and becomes caught up in the family mysteries that still echo in his own time...

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: Shortcut to Happiness
programme.desc: A down-and-out writer sells his soul to the devil in exchange for fame and fortune. Starring: Alec Baldwin, Anthony Hopkins, Kim Cattrall, Dan Aykroyd, Jennifer Love Hewitt

programme.title: For The Love Of Benji
programme.desc: Benji is back! En route to a vacation in Greece Benji becomes separated from the family in Athens, Benji finds himself on the run from an assortment of international spies seeking an energy scientist, who has been working on a secret formula.

programme.title: The Simple Life of Noah Dearborn
programme.desc: Academy Award winners Sidney Poitier and Dianne Wiest star with Mary-Louise Parker in this enchanting tale about a quiet hero who becomes the talk of the town.

programme.title: Time of the Wolf
programme.desc: After the death of his parents, Aaron has to live on the remote ranch of his distant aunt and uncle. Uncommunicative relatives and the cruelty he suffers from at his new school let him turn to a friendship with a wolf cub orphaned by local farmers.

programme.title: Last Of The Wild Horses
programme.desc: A cowboy winds up in the middle of a turf war between a rancher and his neighbors in Last of the Wild Horses.

programme.title: Secret Agent Super Dragon
programme.desc: A secret agent tries to stop a drug lord from taking over the world with hallucinogenic chewing gum.

programme.title: Cave Dwellers
programme.desc: Newly-married wife Jenni can't tell if the skull she sees in her new home is a ghostly apparition of her husband's dead first wife, hallucinations from her own nervous condition... or something else.

programme.title: The Rebel Set
programme.desc: Three coffee shop customers help an owner rob an armored car.

programme.title: Hercules And The Captive Women
programme.desc: Hercules and the Captive Women: Hercules tries to save his son from an evil queen.

programme.title: The Killer Shrews
programme.desc: An experiment on a remote island goes awfully awry when Professor Marlowe Cragis and his research team accidentally create giant, venomous shrews.

programme.title: The Violent Years
programme.desc: Jam Handy shows the world the glory of sexism with electric kitchen appliances and Ed Wood analyzes the world of criminals spoiled by their parents.

programme.title: Beginning of the End
programme.desc: A swarm of giant grasshoppers, inadvertently created by a radioactive experiment, heads for Chicago.

programme.title: Outlaw of Gor
programme.desc: A hero and loser friend are transplanted to the planet of Gor by mysterious forces and are soon caught up in an evil sorcerer's plot of dastardly evil.

programme.title: MST3K: Werewolf
programme.desc: After digging up strange bones, a man becomes a werewolf.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: McGee's First Flush / House of Ear Wax
programme.desc: Two of McGee and Suzi's former pets "Ocean Apes" return for vengeance and are mutated in all kinds of horrible ways! Squirt's chronic ear wax issues escalate as his giant ball of wax seems to take on a mind of its own.
programme.sub-title: McGee's First Flush / House of Ear Wax

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Schwampbillies / Remember Fort Sunny Bottom
programme.desc: When McGee, Gretchen and Squirt find themselves lost deep in the schwamp.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Sweat, Hot Lakebottom Summer / The S'Mogre
programme.desc: A heat wave forces McGee to sneak a dab of Sawyer's anti-sweat cream. After trying to cheer up Armand, McGee creates a s'more so big, it topples and coats him in delicious goo.
programme.sub-title: Sweat, Hot Lakebottom Summer / The S'Mogre

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Duh'Rehka / Chore Leave
programme.desc: While chasing his gopher-nemesis, Sawyer gets zapped into his brain bin and emerges super smart!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Clockwork Slime / Ride the Haunted Howler
programme.desc: The Campers find a time travelling clock on the beach!
programme.sub-title: Clockwork Slime / Ride the Haunted Howler

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Bird Brains / The Real Vincent
programme.desc: Squirt is eager to assist his idol, Dr. Sapstein on his latest quest for the rare mocker bird.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Messy Bessie / Nanny Num Nums
programme.desc: The campers build a race car to help Sawyer relive his pro-racing days.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Ice Queen / Live and Let Squatch
programme.desc: When the campers try to reclaim their stolen Lakebottom items.
programme.sub-title: Ice Queen / Live and Let Squatch

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: The Day Squirt Stood Still / Anti Gravity
programme.desc: The campers track down a UFO inhabited by an alien from the planet Squipiter.
programme.sub-title: The Day Squirt Stood Still / Anti Gravity

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Cluck of the Were-Chicken / Gnome Force
programme.desc: When a hulking were-chicken stalks the camp, McGee must lead the hunt to prove his innocence.
programme.sub-title: Cluck of the Were-Chicken / Gnome Force

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: McGee the Mermaid / Welcome to Buttcon
programme.desc: The kids accidentally resurrect an evil mermaid who floods the camp.
programme.sub-title: McGee the Mermaid / Welcome to Buttcon

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: S.P.U.D.S / Monster Hunters "R" Us
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Squirt disturb the potato King!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Late Afternoon of the Living Gitch / Mindsuckers from the Depths
programme.desc: When Squirt's stinky underwear is washed in toxic cleanser, the gitch comes alive.
programme.sub-title: Late Afternoon of the Living Gitch / Mindsuckers from the Depths

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Fright Club / Bottomdome
programme.desc: The campers discover an enchanted flashlight.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Are You My Mommy? / Slimey Come Home

programme.sub-title: Are You My Mommy? / Slimey Come Home

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Marshmallow Madness / 28 Suzi's Later
programme.desc: Armand goes into a feeding frenzy when wild marshmallows give the campers a rash.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Who's Ghouling Who? / The Adominable Dr. Squatch
programme.desc: McGee accidentally summons Percy, a ghost with a very 'fiery' personality.
programme.sub-title: Who's Ghouling Who? / The Adominable Dr. Squatch

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Bloody Marty / Ghost In The Mower
programme.desc: The kids ignore Rosebuds warning and summon Bloody Marty from the ominous mirror world.
programme.sub-title: Bloody Marty / Ghost In The Mower

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Lakebo-tron / Rise of the Dawn of the Beginning of the Planet of Armand!
programme.desc: McGee and Buttsquat go head-to-head in an 80's style arcade game! But as the points build up, the boys become digitized inside the game. The kids head back through the Lakebottom inter-dimensional portal, hoping to find a Sasquatch version of the camp.
programme.sub-title: Lakebo-tron / Rise of the Dawn of the Beginning of the Planet of Armand!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Golfadoom / There is Something About Mamba
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Buttsquat must beat Haggis MacJockstrap in golf!
programme.sub-title: Golfadoom / There is Something About Mamba

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Jaws of Old Toothy / Arachnattack
programme.desc: When Sawyer closes the beach because of a giant fish, McGee vows to rid the lake of "Old Toothy".

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: The Superfantastic Mega-Buds / It Came From My Nose

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Tooth Troll / Hive and Seek

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Meet The Gretch's Parents / Now with 100% More Portal
programme.desc: McGee and Squirt are flabbergasted when Gretchen's parents turn out to be the famous action-star couple, the Gritchersons! The kids discover an interdimensional portal to travel back and forth between parallel Lakebottom dimensions.
programme.sub-title: Meet The Gretch's Parents / Now with 100% More Portal

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Terror form the Toybox / Slimeball Run

programme.sub-title: Terror form the Toybox / Slimeball Run

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Mc Crossroads / Lucky Duck

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Camp Lockdownbottom / All You Need is Larva

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Big Top Terror / Slimal Fear
programme.desc: The campers summon Armand's old rival, Doofus the clown who vows to destroy the campers.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Last Days / Knock on Wood
programme.desc: McGee tries to save Camp Lakebottom from being overtaken by the Grim Camper.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Butt-Squad / You Sank My Battle-Squirt!
programme.desc: Buttsquat steps in to help the bottomdwellers when they suddenly acquire the same red hair and freckles as their Sunny Smiles nemesis. When an alien invasion threatens Camp Lakebottom, the kids defend the camp against the alien mothership!

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 177
programme.desc: Can mirrors be used to reflect sunlight and illuminate a tomb, as depicted in "The Mummy?" Can a runaway car be safely stopped if another driver pulls in front and slows down?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 155
programme.desc: Can a sneeze leave a person's nose at around 100mph? Can sneeze droplets travel up to 30 feet? Can nasal secretions contaminate a room quickly? Can you be decapitated by a tornado?

programme.title: Mythbusters Outtakes Special
programme.desc: It’s a shame that not all of the testing footage can be included in the final show that goes to air. In this special episode, the outtakes are in with never-before-seen footage.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 170
programme.desc: Can a magazine and a toaster be used to blow up a room full of flammable gas? Can the contents of an airplane toilet leak out mid-flight and freeze into a lethal projectile?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 92
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can yodeling actually set off an avalanche? Do cars have better traction on ice while driving backwards?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 13
programme.desc: Myths tested: Could the sinking Titanic suck a person down with it? Does a goldfish's memory only last for seconds? Can explosives packed in a trombone cause the slide to rocket off it?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 119
programme.desc: Will a motorcycle flip if a pole is thrust into the front wheel? Can someone break out of prison with a rope made of toilet paper, human hair or bedsheets?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 19
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can mirrors be used to make a death ray? What solutions are effective against skunk smell? Which common objects are bulletproof?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 145
programme.desc: Can you accidentally kill yourself with a bullet that ricochets off three walls? Could a medieval army have used trees to catapult dead bodies over a castle wall?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 64
programme.desc: Myths tested: If a steel cable under high tension snaps, could it cut a human in half? Can sounds and vibrations be recorded into the grooves of ancient pottery?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 9
programme.desc: Myths tested: Was it possible to survive an escape from Alcatraz? Does a duck's quack echo? Does the government implant secret chips in people that stud finders can detect?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 34
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can an unamplified human voice shatter a wine glass? Does a rolling stone gather moss? Can a vacuum cleaner be converted into a jet engine?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 200
programme.desc: Can a trench with perfect 90-degree corners absorb an explosion's shockwave inside the trench better than a trench with rounded corners?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 47
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a deadly crossbow be made from materials available to prison inmates? Can vodka remove the smell of cigarettes from clothes or kill bees like an insecticide?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 33
programme.desc: Myths tested: Could using a phone in a thunderstorm result in being electrocuted? Could a bullet pass through a man's genitals, into a woman's abdomen and subsequently make the woman pregnant?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 60
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can speaker power alone destroy a car? Will driving faster on a bumpy road smooth out the ride?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 216
programme.desc: Is an axe more effective than a gun when you are swarmed by zombies? Can the force of many people bust down a door? Can you escape from a horde of zombies?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 151
programme.desc: Are some types of people more tolerant to pain? Can a BBQ propane tank heat up enough in a fire to launch through a garage roof like a rocket?

programme.title: Fear Factor: Boat To Boat Transfer,Worm Wine,Matrix Truck Straddle
programme.desc: Contestants must leap back and forth between boats collecting as many flags as possible as well as spend time in a grape-stomping vat in this episode.
programme.sub-title: Boat To Boat Transfer,Worm Wine,Matrix Truck Straddle

programme.title: Fear Factor: Cable Surfing, Gift Exchange, Lake O'Fire
programme.desc: A contestant must slide down two cables while standing on a small platform and swim underneath a 20 foot by 40-foot grid on fire. One at a time, contestants pick nasty gifts from under a Christmas tree in this festive episode.
programme.sub-title: Cable Surfing, Gift Exchange, Lake O'Fire

programme.title: Fear Factor: Dual Helicopter Box Drop, Bee Rescue, Submerged Car Rescue
programme.desc: Contestants will be placed on a platform floating in the water, where they will grab a skid of the helicopter. Player is chained between two poles and covered with bees. Contestants will be seated in the front of a car suspended over the water.
programme.sub-title: Dual Helicopter Box Drop, Bee Rescue, Submerged Car Rescue

programme.title: Fear Factor: Dune Buggy Drag, Bury Spouses Head, Heli Drop and Raft Pull
programme.desc: A contestant will be contected to a dune buggy by his ankles. Another will have to bury their spouse's head in worms using only their mouth.
programme.sub-title: Dune Buggy Drag, Bury Spouses Head, Heli Drop and Raft Pull

programme.title: Fear Factor: Couples Chain Submerge, Sewer Transfer
programme.desc: A contestant will be chained to a platform, waiting for a second contestant to free them with the key. Another player will dunk their head into a dirty tank and retrieve a cow's heart with their mouth.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Spouse Spin, Fear Factor Pie
programme.desc: Couples will use their mouths to root around in pies made from wax worms, pig stomach, fish sauce and duck tongue.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Gross Dunk Tank,Heli Spouse Slalom
programme.desc: Player A is placed on a dunk tank. In the tank is a mixture of cow parts floating in water. One member of the team will be suspended by their ankles underneath a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Heli Spouse Rescue, Dumpster Dive
programme.desc: In one stunt from this episode, a female contestant will be placed in a cage that is hung from a helicopter and is approx. 20 feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Lean and Grab, Bobbing in Rats, Hog Tied Mate
programme.desc: Contestant will be standing on a beam that is suspended high in the air. Player is placed in a coffin with 100 chicken feet and is then covered in rats. Couples stunt one of the team members is hog tied by four ropes and suspended.
programme.sub-title: Lean and Grab, Bobbing in Rats, Hog Tied Mate

programme.title: Fear Factor: Heli Crawl and Rope Slide,Suspended Floor Drop, Intestine Chew, Milk and Drink, Mini Motorcycle Plank
programme.desc: Contestants must chew through a cow intestine and ride a mini motorcycle across a beam being suspended from a crane.
programme.sub-title: Heli Crawl and Rope Slide,Suspended Floor Drop, Intestine Chew, Milk and Drink, Mini Motorcycle Plank

programme.title: Fear Factor: Helicopter Flag Snag, Fondue Party, Eel Hang, Two Wheel Truck Ramp
programme.desc: A contestant must get on a pole under the nose of a helicopter. Players will bob in cheese and then eat grasshoppers. Contestants are hung upside down into a Plexiglas tank filled with Eels. Contestants must drive up with only two wheels.
programme.sub-title: Helicopter Flag Snag, Fondue Party, Eel Hang, Two Wheel Truck Ramp

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tube Escape, Box of Reptiles, Hurricane Slide
programme.desc: A contestant will be put in a clear tube just above water. Snakes and lizards will then be dumped in the box.
programme.sub-title: Tube Escape, Box of Reptiles, Hurricane Slide

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tumbler Transfer, Grab and Grind, Tanker Truck Flag Build
programme.desc: Contestant will be standing in either end of two large cylinders, suspended in the air over water. Player must grab a mouth full of insects, then place into a meat grinder using their mouth. Inside the tanker truck, it would be filled with water.
programme.sub-title: Tumbler Transfer, Grab and Grind, Tanker Truck Flag Build

programme.title: Fear Factor: Twirling Misery, Eat Live Snails, Car Jump Out of Back of Semi
programme.desc: Contestants are placed in a box with two plexi-glass walls that will be lifted off the ground. Contestants will be served live snails. Contestants are seated in a car that is in the back of a semi truck.
programme.sub-title: Twirling Misery, Eat Live Snails, Car Jump Out of Back of Semi

programme.title: Fear Factor: Extreme Building Plunge, Bug Windshield, Rotating Beam To Platform
programme.desc: Contestants will be dangled from a rope off a roof. Contestants will also have to clear a bug splattered car windshield using only their mouth and face.
programme.sub-title: Extreme Building Plunge, Bug Windshield, Rotating Beam To Platform

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tunnel Flag Snag, Potato Bug Bazooka, Tractor Car Roll
programme.desc: Contestant will stand on top of a truck as it speeds trying to grab as many flags. Contestants will shoot potatoes at a target using a shoulder mounted air cannon.
programme.sub-title: Tunnel Flag Snag, Potato Bug Bazooka, Tractor Car Roll

programme.title: Fear Factor: Murphy Bed Transfer, Fear Factor Minature Golf, Helicopter Bar Hang
programme.desc: Contestants will have to play miniature golf to determine the size of a sea cucumber they will have to eat. They will also be seated on the back of a jet ski driven by a professional driver.
programme.sub-title: Murphy Bed Transfer, Fear Factor Minature Golf, Helicopter Bar Hang

programme.title: Fear Factor: Bound in Chains, Get The Gator, Helicopter Rope Transfer
programme.desc: Contestant will be wrapped in a vest of chains. The contestants will crawl, climb and swim through an obstacle. In this stunt the contestant will be sitting in a helicopter flying approx. 20' over the water.
programme.sub-title: Bound in Chains, Get The Gator, Helicopter Rope Transfer

programme.title: Fear Factor: Team Transfer, Hag Fished, Cable Stand
programme.desc: Three co-ed couples will be placed on a tight rope and suspended over water in a heart-pounding stunt. In another, players will be stacked in boxes.
programme.sub-title: Team Transfer, Hag Fished, Cable Stand

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Old Dogs
programme.desc: Engine trouble plagues Buffalo's newest Electra, ZFE, and a standoff between Joe and Transport Canada threatens to close the airline. At the same time, Joe faces a tough decision about his old dog Sophie.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Checkflight
programme.desc: Joe leaves to undergo medical tests at the Mayo Clinic in Phoenix, Arizona. Jeff and Sam stress over their DC-3 checkflights and Joe celebrates turning 70-his way.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Second Chances
programme.desc: Rookie pilot Jeff nearly runs off the runway. Prefkar learns to play hockey but drops the ball at Buffalo and Joe goes on a date with a real dog.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Big Plans, Bad Luck
programme.desc: Mikey decides to get Buffalo involved in a D-Day paratrooper jump to commemorate the 70th anniversary of D-Day. Prefkar escapes Hay River courier duty. Cory finds an original bracket for the DC3 static line for Mikey's D-Day jump.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Dogfight
programme.desc: Buffalo's top guns, rookies and vets, go to California for aerial dogfights in real fighter planes. Cory and Mikey race to get ready for the D-Day jump.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: D-Day
programme.desc: Mikey's much-planned D-Day tribute parachute jump with 20 paratroopers hits a wall when Joe refuses to fly his DC-3 to the drop zone.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Buffalo Air
programme.desc: Rookie co-pilot Scott faces his worst nightmare when a faltering Curtiss C-46 Commando engine and low fog force a scary landing.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Pre-Christmas Rush
programme.desc: Christmas is just around the corner, but Buffalo's crucial food and mail runs come to a halt. An engine seizure strands Scott, AJ and the C-46 plane, creating a chaotic chain reaction.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Birthday from Hell
programme.desc: A string of bad luck turns chief pilot Arnie's 66th birthday run into the flight from hell - and threatens to spoil his naughty birthday surprise.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: A Big Deal
programme.desc: When a power failure leaves Rankin Inlet exposed to the brutal northern elements, captain Justin races to deliver an emergency generator.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: 40/40/40
programme.desc: Mechanic Cory races against the clock to turn two short-haul waterbombers into transatlantic aircraft for the epic journey to Turkey.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: On the Move
programme.desc: A charter flight falls through the cracks after the McBryans attend a wild family wedding, and an irate Joe pulls captain Justin from the Turkey test flights to do the job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Suspension
programme.desc: A furious Joe fights against a federal suspension that will prevent him from carrying passengers for the first time in 20 years.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Cause for Celebration
programme.desc: AJ and Candace get married in the Ice Castle. A frustrated Chuck tries to get the Electra to pay her way. A flummoxed Mikey tries to bake a cake for Joe's birthday.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Transatlantic Crossing
programme.desc: The Turkey crew makes the critical jump over the North Atlantic. But en route to Portugal, one crew is forced to turn back.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Thin Ice
programme.desc: C-46 and DC-4 crews race against the spring melt to fly mining equipment to an airstrip on a frozen lake.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: The Crash
programme.desc: After thousands of hours of painstaking preparation and dangerous flying, a terrible accident devastates the waterbomber crew in Turkey - and everyone at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Change of Seasons
programme.desc: When her husband quits after a blowout with Joe, Kelly is put in a terrible position. Will she stay at Buffalo - or will she go?

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Up In the Air
programme.desc: After her husband's acrimonious departure from Buffalo, Kelly has a confrontation that decides whether she, too, will quit.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Frozen Four
programme.desc: As Joe fights a Transport Canada claim against the airline, star pilot Justin is tasked with shipping an 8,000lb generator to a remote town. But a controversial decision results in the DC-4 becoming stranded and frozen solid on a High Arctic airstrip.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Kolter’s Khronicles
programme.desc: The Hanoi have expanded their reach beyond the boundaries of LINK VRAINS, and Kolter’s chronicling the chaos!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Under VRAINS
programme.desc: Ghost Gal ventures into the vast underbelly of LINK VRAINS and uncovers a sinister secret the Hanoi have been hiding!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Showdown in the Sewers
programme.desc: Ghost Gal puts her data on the line when she Speed Duels against Varis in the sewers of LINK VRAINS!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: The Tower of Hanoi
programme.desc: The Hanoi’s greatest weapon is about to be unleashed unless Yusaku can link into the VRAINS and stop it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Once Upon A Time
programme.desc: As Blue Angel's biggest fan, Spectre knows all her dueling tricks and techniques - which makes him the fiercest foe she's ever faced!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Roots of Evil
programme.desc: Spectre knows Blue Angel's entire life story, and he’s going to give it a sad ending!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: The Hollow
programme.desc: Playmaker must cut down Spectre’s defenses if he is to topple the Tower of Hanoi!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: A Bridge Too Far
programme.desc: Spectre stoops to a new low when he reveals a game changer that leaves Playmaker without a play to make!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Out on a Limb
programme.desc: The duel between Playmaker and Spectre comes to a crashing conclusion as the bridge they’re battling on begins to break apart!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Looking Back
programme.desc: Varis reflects on the past as he prepares for a future without LINK VRAINS!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Ring the Bell
programme.desc: Gore grapples with Varis as he looks to drop the hammer on the Hanoi!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Gore at War
programme.desc: Making a comeback is what Gore does best, but will his finisher be enough to vanquish Varis?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Truth and Consequences
programme.desc: Playmaker makes a final stand against Varis to save LINK VRAINS!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Storm Access
programme.desc: Playmaker’s life points are on the verge of elimination - along with any hopes of stopping Varis and the Tower of Hanoi!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: The Reveal
programme.desc: Varis reveals his true identity – as well as the terrifying truth behind the Ignis!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Illusion of Hope
programme.desc: Time’s running out as Playmaker has less than one hour before all of LINK VRAINS is destroyed!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Standing Tall
programme.desc: The Tower of Hanoi is nearly complete – leaving Varis a win away from deleting LINK VRAINS once and for all!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Link to the Future
programme.desc: Varis is on the verge of victory unless Playmaker can make one last play to stop him!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: On Your Mark, Get Set, DUEL!
programme.desc: Hoping to save his friends from the clutches of Sector Security, Yusei Fudo challenges his old nemesis Officer Trudge to a Turbo Duel!
programme.sub-title: On Your Mark, Get Set, DUEL!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Creepy Crawlies
programme.desc: With his Duel Runner on the line, Yusei finds himself dueling against a bully who battles with a deck full of bugs.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: Looking to get his Stardust Dragon card back from Jack Atlas, Yusei takes off in a race against time and Sector Security.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Blast from the Past, Part 1
programme.desc: After making it through to New Domino City, Yusei confronts his old friend Jack Atlas and challenges him to a Turbo Duel.
programme.sub-title: A Blast from the Past, Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Blast from the Past, Part 2
programme.desc: As the clash between Jack and Yusei comes to a climatic close, a mysterious creature appears as their two Dragons duke it out.
programme.sub-title: A Blast from the Past, Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Facility, Part 1
programme.desc: After being sent to The Facility, Yusei befriends an odd old man who duels with a treasure deck full of ancient mystic cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Facility, Part 2
programme.desc: Yusei duels the top dog at The Facility using Yanagi's treasure deck. Meanwhile, Jack learns about the mystery surrounding his Mark of the Crimson Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Fire It Up!
programme.desc: With Yusei still serving out his sentence at The Facility, Jack finds himself having to face off against former Turbo Duel Champion Hunter Pace in a rematch that could send Jack's career up in smoke.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Lockdown Duel, Part 1
programme.desc: After being sent to the Maximum Security Zone in The Facility, Yusei risks being permanently placed in lockdown when he decides to duel Chief Armstrong in order to win a pardon for his pal.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Lockdown Duel, Part 2
programme.desc: As the clash between Yusei and the Chief comes to a shocking conclusion, Yusei must figure out a way to win the battle before his life points get zapped to zero.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Take Back, Part 1
programme.desc: After being freed from the Facility, Yusei risks being re-incarcerated when he tries to take back his Duel Runner from Sector Security's vault.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Take Back, Part 2
programme.desc: With Officer Trudge in hot pursuit, Yusei looks to rev his game up before the long arm of the law grabs a hold of him for good!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Duel to Remember
programme.desc: When Yusei can't remember his own name, he agrees to duel a pint-sized player named Leo in the hopes of getting his memory back.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Bloom of the Black Rose
programme.desc: As Leo and his pal Dexter venture into the narrows of New Domino City to find the mysterious duelist known as the Black Rose, Blister breaks out a plan to keep Yusei's friends in the Satellite Sector safe from Goodwin's goons.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Welcome to the Fortune Cup
programme.desc: The stage is set for the Fortune Cup as eight elite duelists vie for the chance to take on reigning champion Jack Atlas. However, for the Master of Ceremonies Rex Goodwin, it's not about who wins or loses.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Battle With the Black Rose
programme.desc: The second duel of the Fortune Cup is about to get under way as the mysterious duelist known as the Black Rose finds herself having to face off against a medieval menace named Sir Randsborg.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Surprise, Surprise!
programme.desc: With the first Turbo Duel of the Fortune Cup set to start, a surprise guest forces Yusei's competition to take an unexpected pit stop.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Return to the Spirit World, Part 1
programme.desc: Director Goodwin enlists the hypnotic powers of the Professor to expose Luna as a Signer and uncover the secrets she unknowingly knows of the Duel Monsters Spirit World.
programme.sub-title: Return to the Spirit World, Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Return to the Spirit World, Part 2
programme.desc: As the battle between the Professor and Luna continues, Luna looks to keep a promise she made to protect the Duel Monsters Spirit World, but in order for her to succeed, she must first break free of the hypnotic hold the Professor has on her.
programme.sub-title: Return to the Spirit World, Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Second Round Showdown, Part 1
programme.desc: The semifinals of the Fortune Cup are about to begin, and the first match of day two features Yusei going toe-to-toe with the tower of power - Greiger!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Second Round Showdown, Part 2
programme.desc: With no cards left in his hand and his life points about to get blasted by Greiger, Yusei has one draw left to take down this tower of power to keep in the hunt to duel Jack in the championship round.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dueling Minds
programme.desc: In the second battle of the semifinals, Akiza squares off against the professional profiler Commander Koda, but with her tournament life on the line, can Akiza outplay an opponent who claims to know her every move?

programme.title: You, Me and Him
programme.desc: Olivia is a career-driven lawyer in a stable relationship with her younger girlfriend, Alex. Olivia has no interest in children - until the day she finds herself sobbing uncontrollably over a friend's pregnancy.

programme.title: Nobel Son
programme.desc: On the eve of Barkley Michaelson's father receiving the Nobel Prize, Barkley is kidnapped and the requested ransom is the $2,000,000 in Nobel Prize money.

programme.title: School for Scoundrels
programme.desc: A young guy short on luck enrolls in a class to build confidence to help win over the girl of his dreams, which becomes complicated when his teacher has the same agenda.

programme.title: Dan in Real Life
programme.desc: In this down-to-earth dramedy, a widowed advice columnist and single father (Steve Carell) falls in love with a French beauty (Juliette Binoche) only to discover she is dating his brother.

programme.title: The Winning Season: The Winning Season
programme.desc: The story of a washed up basketball coach who must learn to overcome his love of booze and his overdeveloped macho nature in order to re-invent himself as a real man and give a bunch of no-hopers a shot at a WINNING SEASON!

programme.title: Cup of Love
programme.desc: Zoe Walker is a food scientist who's been sent to Colombia to design a coffee flavor that appeals to millennials. In the village of Salento, Zoe meets Diego Valdez, a local plantation owner who is reluctant to work with her.

programme.title: Employee of the Month
programme.desc: Shocking twists follow after bank manager David Walsh is fired, dumped by his fiancée and shot in the span of a day. Starring : Matt Dillon, Steve Zahn, Christina Applegate. (Comedy/Drama)

programme.title: Battling for Baby
programme.desc: After Katherine (Courteney Cox) decides to return to work to help pay the bills, her baby's grandmothers (Debbie Reynolds & Suzanne Pleshette) argue over who will take care of her child.

programme.title: Let Go
programme.desc: Featuring the king of comedy Kevin Hart, this hilarious, unconventional and heartfelt journey is all about love, loss and other felonies! Discontent parole officer Walter is struggling with the humdrums of married life.

programme.title: A Rainy Day In New York
programme.desc: Woody Allen returns to the romantic fields of previous hits Vicky Cristina Barcelona and Midnight in Paris.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Prisoner of War
programme.desc: Barrow Green H17 Anti-Aircraft Battery build to protect the Liverpool Docks and general area and a former prisoner of war camp, holds some sinister secrets and Ghost Dimension uncover paranormal activity dating back to WW2. What will be caught tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Ammo Store Explosion
programme.desc: Simonswood Supply Depot was one of the main ammunition depots in Lancashire, England during World War II. Located at Simonswood, it was used as an ammunition depot delivered by ROF Kirkby.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Washed Away Air Raid
programme.desc: This abandoned World War Two air raid shelter holds paranormal secrets that haunt anyone that ventures inside. A ghostly entity makes contacts they team uncover the whats behind the hauntings.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Buried inside the Bombing Decoy
programme.desc: A Second World War bombing decoy site at Formby. It was commissioned in December 1940 as a 'Permanent Starfish' site to deflect enemy bombing from the city of Liverpool and it is now home to a whole host of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: WW2 Hospital Haunting
programme.desc: Built in the early 1900’s and now used as offices, a former world war hospital has become the new home for something supernatural. Strange voices, eerie footsteps and the sounds of painful screams have all been reported. What will be uncovered tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Fort Crosby
programme.desc: Crosby Battery, also known as Crosby Point Battery and Fort Crosby, was an artillery battery situated between Crosby and Hightown in Lancashire, United Kingdom. The battery was used for port defence and anti-aircraft defence during WWII.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Gwrych Castle: Supernatural Gateway
programme.desc: Bex and Sean explore Gwrych Castle in Wales, renowned for its hauntings. Amid eerie voices, strange noises, and shadows, they use specialized equipment to unveil the spectral mysteries lurking within. Will they unearth Gwrych Castle's ghostly secrets?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Gwrych Castle: Secrets of the Unknown
programme.desc: In the thrilling conclusion, Bex and Sean return to Gwrych Castle for intense paranormal investigations. Eerie chambers, mysterious apparitions, and chilling whispers await as they seek conclusive otherworldly proof.
programme.sub-title: Gwrych Castle: Secrets of the Unknown

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Phantoms of Formby: Starfish Bunker Unveiled
programme.desc: Join "Ghost Dimension" at Merseyside's Formby Starfish Bunker. Unveil its wartime secrets, encountering eerie whispers, phantom footsteps, and soldier apparitions. Can they capture undeniable proof of the paranormal?
programme.sub-title: Phantoms of Formby: Starfish Bunker Unveiled

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sands Lake Secrets: Paranormal Mysteries
programme.desc: Explore paranormal phenomena at Sands Lake – from mysterious voices to ghostly encounters. The secrets of this haunting location are unveiled.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sands Lake Spirits: Haunted Legends
programme.desc: In part two of our Sands Lake investigation, we dive deeper into the unexplained, capturing voices from the beyond and unlocking the lake's mysteries.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Shadows' Whispers: Barn Haunting
programme.desc: Join us as we uncover eerie voices, paranormal encounters, and unsolved mysteries within a barn with a chilling history.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Dark Echoes: Haunted Barn Unveiled
programme.desc: Dive into the unexplained as we explore a barn filled with uncharted spirits, whispers from the other side, and chilling encounters.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunting Echoes: Clarke Zoo's Secrets
programme.desc: Join us on a chilling investigation as we unravel the spectral enigmas within Clarke Zoo Gardens. Eerie encounters and eerie secrets await.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Beyond the Veil: Zoo's Ghostly Enigma
programme.desc: In the heart of Clarke Zoo, paranormal activity reigns. We journey deeper, uncovering spine-tingling apparitions and ghostly revelations.
programme.sub-title: Beyond the Veil: Zoo's Ghostly Enigma

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Factory Whispers: Unraveling Unknown
programme.desc: In 'Whispers in the Factory,' our team delves into a historic site, where eerie voices and enigmatic questions haunt every corner. Uncover the mysteries of restless spirits as we journey through a chilling landscape of the unknown.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads deep into the Pendle Hills in search of the Pendle Witches that went to trial in 1612 and were hung for witchcraft. The investigation takes an unexpected twist with a stop at the New Inn, Pendles most haunted pub.
programme.sub-title: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of Pendle Hill and ventures even deeper into the hills. The night takes an unexpected turn with a dramatic ending, which he believes was caused by the witches.
programme.sub-title: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Shadow Menace Haunting Morley Market - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to the town of Morley to investigate the infamous Morley Market. A place once bustling with people from years gone by, it is now haunted by shadow figures, and they appear to want to make themselves known.
programme.sub-title: Shadow Menace Haunting Morley Market - Part 1

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties in Canterbury, County Durham and Devon.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view a two-bed flat in Berkshire, a mid-terraced house in Derby and a Victorian property in Enfield.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view properties Exeter, Isle of Wight and Wales.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 11
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a pleasantly surprising terrace in Cheshire, a large flat in London with great views and a house in Torquay.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 11
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a property in Derbyshire, a former cigar warehouse in London and an unusual flat in Manchester.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 31
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts visit mid terrace property in Blackpool, a property in Earlsfield in London which requires very little work & an old cottage in Harrogate which is in need of updating.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 6
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a plot of land in Ripon, find a problem behind a wardrobe in Kent and an old Ambulance hall in Mid Glamorgan.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view properties in Lincoln, Dover and Nottinghamshire.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties in Devon and Dover.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 14
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a house in Devon with some interesting wallpaper, a marvellous flat in Kensal Green and a valuable bit of land in Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 30
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a house in Dorset that's full of surprises, a property on Portobello Road in London and a cottage in Newquay.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties in Kent, Derbyshire and Manchester.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander visit a flat with communal gardens near Twickenham.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 10
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a a house in Swindon, a flat in Neasden, Greater London and revisit a fabulous Manor Farm house near Lincoln.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 38
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander & Martin Roberts visit a north London flat, a colossal house in Kent and a 17th Century cottage in Wiltshire.

programme.title: Satan's Cheerleaders
programme.desc: The janitor at a local high school is actually the scout for a coven of Satanists on the lookout for a virgin to sacrifice. One day he kidnaps the cheerleading squad to use for their rituals. However, one of the cheerleaders is actually a witch.

programme.title: Beneath the Valley of the Ultra-Vixens
programme.desc: Believe it or not even in Smalltown USA there are still people who are unfulfilled and unrelieved in the midst of plenty. Levonna and Lamar could have the perfect relationship if it were not Lamar's obsession with rear entry.

programme.title: The Lair Of The White Worm
programme.desc: After a mysterious skull is unearthed, it's stolen and used by its new owner to worship a pagan god who hungers for the taste of virginal flesh in this cheeky horror-comedy.

programme.title: D.O.A.
programme.desc: Frank Bigelow, told he's been poisoned and has only a few days to live, tries to find out who killed him and why.

programme.title: Perfect People
programme.desc: After many years of marriage, Ken and Barbara decide to radically change their way of living. In order to become more attractive, they submit themselves to modern diets, exercise, and plastic surgery.

programme.title: Androcles And The Lion
programme.desc: Based on George Bernard Shaw's Roman satire about a Christian tailor's fortuitous friendship with a wild lion.

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre: Frankenstein's Castle of Freaks
programme.desc: When a Neanderthal man is lynched by villagers, Count Frankenstein (Rossano Brazzi) uses his years of research to bring the monster back to life. (1984)

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: Vampire Count Orlok expresses interest in a new residence and real estate agent Hutter's wife.

programme.title: Keep The Aspidistra Flying
programme.desc: When successful advertiser, Gordon Comstock (Richard E. Grant), abruptly walks away from his career to pursue his dream of being a poet, his path is much more difficult than expected and soon financial problems begin to pile up.

programme.title: Jungle B
programme.desc: A boy raised by wild animals tries to adapt to human village life.

programme.title: Hunter: Case X
programme.desc: McCall goes undercover to help Hunter investigate the deaths of two models involved in pornographic films.

programme.title: Hunter: Night of the Dragons
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall's investigation of a killing in Chinatown leads them to a Chinese gang leader being pursued by a police officer with a personal interest in the case.

programme.title: Hunter: Biggest Man in Town
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall go undercover at an exclusive resort to find a blackmailer's killer.

programme.title: Hunter: Rich Girl
programme.desc: When a millionaire is nearly killed, his wife is the primary heir and prime suspect -- until she's murdered. Hunter goes undercover to find the real killer.

programme.title: Hunter: Killer in a Halloween Mask
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall become involved in a string of bizarre murders when they're assigned as technical advisors for a television show.

programme.title: Hunter: Rape & Revenge - Part 1
programme.desc: When McCall is raped by a South American diplomat who's immune from prosecution, Hunter turns renegade and follows the man to his homeland.

programme.title: Hunter: Rape & Revenge - Part 2
programme.desc: Against departmental orders, Hunter goes to South America to stalk a diplomat who raped McCall.

programme.title: Hunter: Six Million Dollar Misunderstanding
programme.desc: A security guard-turned-thief loses the money he stole and searches for it with Hunter and McCall in close pursuit.

programme.title: Hunter: The Big Fall
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall realize they're attracted to each other as they protect an endangered witness who's set to testify before a grand jury.

programme.title: Hunter: Waiting for Mr. Wrong
programme.desc: Hunter becomes involved with a beautiful model he suspects of complicity in a jewelry robbery.

programme.title: Hunter: Think Blue
programme.desc: Hunter helps a policeman who is framed for the murder of his wife.

programme.title: Hunter: Blow Up
programme.desc: Hunter is frustrated in his pursuit of a package bomber whose ruthless methods are being used to systematically kill the participants in the man's trial.

programme.title: Hunter: War Zone
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall work to stop a brigade of suburban mercenaries plotting to break a drug dealer out of prison.

programme.title: Hunter: Burned
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall are given 72 hours to find an attorney who falsified his death.

programme.title: Hunter: Scrap Metal
programme.desc: When a dying contract killer confesses he was once paid to kill Hunter's father, Hunter goes in pursuit of the true murderer.

programme.title: Hunter: Fagin 1986
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: 62 Hours of Terror
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: Death Machine
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Euronews
programme.desc: Euronews offers a unique perspective on world events. It empowers people to make up their own mind by delivering factual analysis and a diversity of viewpoints. Because all views matter, Euronews is "All Views".

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 5
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Tiff Needell host a battle of the best cheap hot hatches on sale. The Ford Fiesta ST, RenaultSport Clio and Peugeot 208 GTI are all thrashed to the limit before Tiff and Jason reveal the champion.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason and Tiff team up with Ross Noble and Charley Boorman for a series of arduous off-road challenges.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford tests Mini's chic rival, the Fiat 500; "Fifth Gear" tests whether fuel additives really work by scientifically analyzing four different brands.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford conducts a shocking crash test that could prove to be essential viewing for family motorists; Tim hits the road with the latest camera alerting systems.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny hunts for the ultimate estate car, setting his sights on the Skoda Superb Estate and the Volvo 850 T5-R.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny tests the latest Jeep Wrangler to see how it stacks up against the original WWII model; Tim Shaw tackles the car tax; Jason Plato goes behind the wheel of the new Aston Martin V8 Vantage.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim Shaw visits Pit Start, a fully-stocked repair shop with a twist — there are no mechanics.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff and Jason face off on an enormous off-road playground; Tim investigates the cratered world of potholes.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim investigates the government's new scrappage system that promises cash in exchange for bangers; Tiff and Jason race a pair of double-decker buses.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny Smith tests the VW Passat CC vs. the Mercedes CLS; Jonny Smith becomes an ice cream man for the day to test out the newly revamped Citroen Berlingo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In the last episode of the season, Tiff tests a Caterham Roadsport 175 by driving essential medical supplies around the country; Tom drives SEAT's new family saloon; Jason enjoys the monstrous Lamborghini LP670-4 Super Veloce.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato races two fast estates; Tom Ford tests the latest Honda Accord and assists the HM Plant Honda Superbike Team along the way.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Fifth Gear, Jonny Smith is in the Netherlands meeting the De Rooy race team who won the 2012 Dakar rally in their 900hp trucks.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 2
programme.desc: Tiff Needell and Jason Plato hold a knock-out tournament to see if the 570hp Mercedes SLS AMG can beat its rivals from Aston Martin, Bentley and Jaguar. Jonny Smith meets Swedish rally legend Stig Blomquist for some ice driving lessons

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 3
programme.desc: Tiff Needell conducts a shocking crash test to show why everyone should make sure their next car has electronic stability control. Vicki Butler-Henderson is at an exclusive motor show in Monte Carlo, where she reveals the latest Pagani hypercar.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tiff Needell enters the opening round of the exclusive Lamborghini Super Trofeo race series – with advice from the man with every petrolhead's dream job – Lamborghini chief test driver Giorgio Sanna.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 5
programme.desc: Jason Plato is in Iceland being taught how to race a brutal Formula Off-Road buggy up a cliff of volcanic rock by a former champion. Tiff Needell is joined by former Le Mans winner Guy Smith to test a brand new version of Bentley's best selling car

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 6
programme.desc: Jason Plato is joined by ex-Ferrari F1 driver Mika Salon to pit the brand new £100,000 Mercedes C63 AMG Black Series against its key rival from BMW

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 7
programme.desc: Jonny Smith goes behind the scenes at the gruelling Isle of Man TT motorbike race, and spends the day with TT hero and 19 times winner John McGuinness. Tiff Needell races around the infamous TT circuit in the brand new Subaru BRZ sports car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 8
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson is in Denmark experiencing the exciting world of motorbike speedway with triple world champion Nicki Pederson. Jonny Smith visits Ferrari's hi-tech aluminium factory before taking their latest California supercar out

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 9
programme.desc: Jonny Smith is at the biggest American car show in the world – which takes place just outside a small town in Sweden. He judges the prestigious best in show competition, goes on a late night cruise and tests the brand new Corvette Grand Sport.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 10
programme.desc: Vicki holds a spectacular race against a jet plane, in the ultimate test of the brand new Porsche Boxster. Jonny heads to Norway to test the all new Ford Focus ST hot hatch on an incredible mountain road that every driver should visit in their lifetime

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 11
programme.desc: Jason's in Italy to drive the most talked about hypercar of the year – the 730bhp Pagani Huayra. He's given an exclusive tour of how this incredible machine is made at the company's HQ, and lets the car off the leash on road and track.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 12
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson and Jonny Smith pit two brand new four door supercars head to head at the track – Mercedes CLS63AMG versus Porsche Panamera GTS. Jason heads to the Netherlands to drive what could be the maddest supercar of the year

programme.title: Deadly Women: Loathe Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Neighbors can be a source of friendship and community comfort. But what happens when a neighbor stops watching out for you, and starts watching you. The sinister minds of these women begin to turn sour and they begin to torment their neighbors.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Twisted Thrills
programme.desc: The intimate thoughts of a twisted mind would be enough to stun a community and horrify the world. But thoughts alone may not be enough to turn someone into a killer. This is a bizarre journey into the world of women who kill for twisted thrills.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kill For Cash
programme.desc: Money is a strong motivator. It can be used for good. It can be used for evil. It can be the driving force behind murder. These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: This episode transports us into the teenage territory of Indiana pack leader Melinda Loveless, whose jealousy sparks a rampage that leads to the kidnap and torture of a 12-year-old.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Match Made For Murder
programme.desc: When a woman wants more from her husband than he can give, marriage can be a dangerous union. For these deadly women, relationships mean nothing more than a match made for murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: To Love and to Murder
programme.desc: Marriage is a lifelong commitment of love, and wedding vows. 'To have and to hold; for better, for worse; until death do us part'. But for these monstrous wives, it was only the vow of 'death do us part' they upheld.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Married to Murder
programme.desc: To the outside world, their marriages seemed happy. But behind closed doors, there was no domestic bliss. These women wanted out, but getting a divorce wasn’t their preferred option.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Judi Buenoano secretly murdered lovers to claim on insurance policies whilst nurse Genene Jones secretly killed at least 46 infants left in her care between 1980 and 1982.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: We want to believe that all women would give their lives to protect their children. But there are horrifying cases when a mother will turn against her natural instinct and kill her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death
programme.desc: Love and money are a beautiful marriage, for the lucky ones they create a life of happiness and ease. Unless the love is of money, the bride is a killer, and the groom their victim.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While their sisters chose a life of sensible, suburban motherhood, these deadly women chose a life of crime. They lived with the thrills, the danger and the deadly consequences of being outlaws.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people’s babies, they spilt blood for money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The heaviest judgments of convicted killers are reserved for those who committed premeditated murder. These women plot and plan. They know the consequences of their actions, but still they go forward to kill.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Unabomber
programme.desc: For nearly two decades a mathematical genius with delusions of single-handedly destroying industrial society, planted or mailed powerful bombs to unsuspecting innocent victims.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: In a small Ohio community, an elderly woman and a teenaged boy disappeared. Because they vanished within hours of each other, police believed the cases were linked. But they didn't know how.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Shattered Shield
programme.desc: In a city awash in narcotics the drug lords have all the power even over the police. Corruption in New Orleans grew like cancer, eating away at public safety and threatening to destroy the city. Crooked cops break the laws they were sworn to uphold.

programme.title: The FBI Files: No Remorse
programme.desc: A burning body in a dark alley shed light on a cold-blooded killer. His partners in crime would tell the story, if they lived. In the underworld of the drug trade, even a childhood friend can quickly become an enemy.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Family Torn
programme.desc: The parents of 11 yr. old Brittany Martinez knew their daughter was no runaway. Something had happened to her, something terrible. When they failed to find Brittany in their quiet Illinois neighborhood, they called the police.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Target
programme.desc: Over a thousand hunting accidents are reported in the United States each year. Fewer than ten percent of them are fatal. But when one hunter's death seemed suspicious, the FBI was called in to investigate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killer Instinct
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, a serial killer stalked lone victims in the dead of night, his hunting ground the suburbs of Washington, D.C., his target, anyone who owned a car.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Brutal Abduction
programme.desc: A Chicago street gang thought they had figured out how to kidnap people for ransom again and again, and never get caught. But their one mistake was they underestimated the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Lost Boys
programme.desc: In June of 1997, a crime wave swept Iowa like a tornado. It left a trail of robbery, kidnapping, and murder in its wake, and then it moved on. No one knew where.

programme.title: The FBI Files: When Seconds Count
programme.desc: On July 2nd 1994, a 12-year-old girl was abducted from her home in northern California. The FBI knows to act fast, search wide, enlist volunteers. But as the hours slipped by, agents also realized their chances for recovering her alive grew slim.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A daring kidnapping and a bizarre ransom note baffled Mississippi authorities. The victim was the wife of a wealthy businessman. A list of 12 names and a few drops of blood were the only clues to her fate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Terror In Disguise
programme.desc: Banks use a variety of devices to discourage would-be robbers: security cameras, silent alarms, and exploding dye packs. But when an elusive bank robber targeted Seattle's banks, none of these precautions were effective.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1995, our nation's capital was also our nation's murder capital. Even the police weren't safe. While Washington, DC, law enforcement targeted criminals, the criminals targeted law enforcement, even gunning down officers on patrol.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Drops of blood and a torn screen were all that's left to tell authorities what happened to a woman in Indiana. The 21 yr. old victim was taken from her home on a spring morning. She appeared to have no real enemies, there was no clear motive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Radical Agenda
programme.desc: In the 1970's a string of bank robberies and bombings spread fear and destruction along the east coast. The FBI faced a new breed of criminal, the domestic terrorist.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Temple of Fear
programme.desc: In Miami, the discovery of a mutilated body sent investigators on the trail of a deadly cult. But agents found a wall of silence around the cult's members. Potential witnesses, terrified of reprisals, refused to talk.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Above the Law
programme.desc: California Highway Patrolman George Gwaltney discovered the body of 23-year-old Robin Bishop near her car on a remote desert highway.

programme.title: The Best Of Laurel And Hardy
programme.desc: The best moments from the most comical duo in film history: Stan Laurel and Oliver Hardy! This compilation features some of the funniest scenes from comedies that made this pair into household names.

programme.title: Two Tars
programme.desc: At a rail crossing, a small fender-bender incident turns into a major tit-for-tat retaliatory war among various motorists.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Blotto
programme.desc: Stan must lie to his wife to go out with Ollie.

programme.title: The Champion
programme.desc: Charlie finds a "good luck" horseshoe just as he passes a training camp advertising for a boxing partner. Charlie puts the horseshoe in his glove and wins, so the trainer prepares Charlie to fight the world champion.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Below Zero
programme.desc: In need of money, Ollie signs Stan up for a prize fight against an old nemesis.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Berth Marks
programme.desc: Stanley and Oliver stumble into the wrong sleeping compartment on the train to Pottsville.
