programme.title: Barney and Friends: Sweeter Than Candy
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ are helping the park kids get ready for a school play. When Barney tells everyone that putting on shows began in Greece, they want to go visit! While there, they meet some friends and decide to put on a play in an amphitheatre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: China - Welcome, Cousin Riff
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. The letter reveals that his pen pal is coming for a visit. With the help of friends in the park, BJ hurries to get the park ready.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Family and Me
programme.desc: The children are invited to a family picnic in the park, but don't know who invited them. The invitations instruct them to bring a family treasure, so each child has something special with them. Barney helps lead a discussion about families.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Showtime!
programme.desc: Barney, BJ and the kids spend the day preparing for a performance for their friends in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When several sports balls suddenly disappear without a trace, it’s detective BJ to the rescue as he dons trenchcoat and fedora.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop's blankey seems to be getting smaller. But Barney shows her that Baby Bop is growing. Barney and his friends help Riff see the dentist is nothing to be afraid of.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Up, Down, and Around!
programme.desc: When Tony brings his kite to the park to show his friends, it accidentally blows into the branches of a tree! While waiting for a breeze to blow the kite down, Barney, Baby Bop and the kids play games about "up" and "down."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Mr. Boyd prepare his dog Bingo for a trip to the veterinarian for a check, while learning lessons about caring for dogs at the same time. Meanwhile, BJ is searching for his missing baseball, which he suspects was buried by Bingo.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Who's Your Neighbor?
programme.desc: Through pretend play, Barney and the children learn about their community and the people that help them live safely and happily there.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When she finds out that Daniel is going on a trip the next day, Baby Bop wants to go on a trip as well. Everyone decides to pretend to travel the same way Daniel will travel.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bonjour Barney!
programme.desc: Emma wants to paint an award-winning painting for the "Art In The Park Show," but she is just isn't satisfied with her artwork. Barney takes her to France to learn how to paint from his friend Pierre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop isn’t satisfied with the things she can do. When a wheelchair-bound child is unintentionally neglected by his friends, Barney steps in to help.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Cousin Riff is moving to town. Barney encourages everyone to put on a special show.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Emperor's Contest - The Whole Truth
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about a fishing contest that is being held in the park; everyone except Ryan, who doesn't want to follow the contest rules. When Ryan is tempted not to follow the rules, Barney tells a story called "The Emperor's Contest."
programme.sub-title: The Emperor's Contest - The Whole Truth

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Spring Into Fun!
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A World of Friends
programme.desc: The children learn about many different countries while experiencing an "International Fair" on the playground.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop forgets to say "please" and "thank you". Riff shares his dream of becoming an inventor.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Big Garden - Get Happy
programme.desc: Baby Bop wants Barney, BJ and the kids to play with her instead of working in their garden. They promise to play with her as soon as they finish. Baby Bop can't wait, and tries many ways to get them to come play with her now, none of which work.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Sharing Is Caring!
programme.desc: The children bring toys to donate to Mr. Boyd's toy drive. Baby Bop and BJ arrive and after some convincing, Baby Bop learns about the merits of sharing.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Wonderful World of Colors and Shapes
programme.desc: Picture this! When Barney shows off his new painting, his friends are inspired to create their own art show. Discovering how to create new colors and draw shapes, Barney and his friends put on a super-dee-duper art show
programme.sub-title: A Wonderful World of Colors and Shapes

programme.title: Barney and Friends: This Way In, This Way Out!
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.
programme.sub-title: This Way In, This Way Out!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Here Kitty, Kitty
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Friends the Doctor
programme.desc: Time for a check-up! Barney helps his friends discover the world of doctors and dentists as they learn about healthy habits like brushing teeth, getting checkups, eating healthy foods and getting exercise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Tea-riffic Manners
programme.desc: A tea party planned by the children turns into a fun opportunity to reinforce lessons about good manners! Throughout the day, Baby Bop is given helpful advice.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Three kids try to build a pretend farm with disastrous results because they won't work together. Barney and his friends try to cheer up Olivia.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Everybody's Got Feelings
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and BJ learn that everyone has feelings—happy, sad, angry—and sometimes all those feelings can be experienced in just one day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Home Safe Home
programme.desc: Safety first! After learning about fire safety when a firefighter visits the caboose, Barney and his friends are inspired to do a little "safety inspection" of their own.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is disappointed when their trip to the zoo is postponed. Barney tells Baby Bop a tale about keeping your promise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps BJ see that we don't forget old friends when we make new ones. Ryan and his Grandpa have a great day in the Park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop meets a new girl named Jill who doesn’t want to join the fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Riff is asked to be captain of a baseball team, he doesn’t think he can do it. But Barney gives him the courage to try.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Beantown Bidders
programme.desc: 1800s blackpowder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Miami Heat
programme.desc: All-terrain Air Commander Hovercraft, a 1970s NASA countdown clock and a one-of-a-kind 1960s Delta Relay rocket.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Auction Hunters, Ink.
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Jersey Score
programme.desc: Ton & Allen attend a silent auction in NJ, but that doesn't stop the local buyers from letting them know they're not welcome! They uncover a skeet throwing machine from the 1960's & a vintage vehicle with some real horsepower!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ice, Ice, Baby
programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hula Moola
programme.desc: Ton and Allen jet to the Hawaiian islands where they're joined by a feisty new female assistant! The team uncovers a pair of James Bond-style gadgets designed for high-speed underwater travel and a vintage sled.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Knuckle Dust
programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hidden Hot Wheels
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Everything's Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Winchester 1886 rifle invented to kill buffalo; collection of 1950s electric Slot Cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Seeing Red
programme.desc: Sassi attends an anger management course. Ste hits a low point as he upsets both Amber and Kirsty. Shannon decides to rekindle an old romance and Chloe and Jordan welcome a new addition. (S4, ep2)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Getting Lei'd
programme.desc: Briana celebrates Stella's birthday, Jade grows frustrated with her mother, Leah's daughters have mixed feelings about Jeremy, and Chelsea gets a creative opportunity. (S9, ep25)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Normal Parents
programme.desc: Jade's relationship with her mum deteriorates. Things for Briana and John crumble when she visits him. Ali gains independence at a camp for children with muscular dystrophy. (S9, ep26)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Bailout
programme.desc: When Jade's parents are arrested, she's forced to pick up the pieces. Devoin tries to prove to Briana that he can be around for Nova. Leah welcomes Ali home from camp. (S9, ep27)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Sugar-coated Mood
programme.desc: Briana makes a major decision, leaving John sidelined. With her parents still in jail, Jade reaches to Sean for support. Chelsea's anxiety rises with the launch of her clothing design. (S9, ep28)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Don't Miss the Sunset
programme.desc: Luis reappears with a major ask for Briana. Sean's rent is late, forcing Jade to make a difficult choice. Kailyn gets upsetting news. Chelsea celebrates Aubree's 10th birthday. (S9, ep29)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Bear
programme.desc: Kailyn and her boys say goodbye to the family dog. Briana confronts John about their relationship. Chelsea gets a shocking request from Adam's mum. Leah is reminded of her past with Jeremy. (S9, ep30)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 9 Unseen Moments
programme.desc: Nessa and the cast of "Teen Mom 2" watch and react to never-before-seen clips from the past season.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 9 Reunion Part 1
programme.desc: Dr. Drew and Nessa begin the biggest reunion ever by chatting with each of the moms, but conflict between Jenelle & Nessa leads to major drama.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 9 Reunion Part 2
programme.desc: Jenelle returns to discuss her final season of TM2, Kail and Vee look back at their tumultuous past, Briana calls out Devoin, and Chelsea opens up about her post-partum issues.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 9 Reunion Part 3
programme.desc: Kailyn announces the newest member of the Teen Mom 2 cast. Jace's dad, Andrew, makes an appearance for the first time since the first Teen Mom 2 Reunion. Cole and Aubrey join Chelsea on stage.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Reunion Part 1
programme.desc: Chelsea and Leah meet Jade and discuss their similarities. Kail defends her parenting decisions and Briana reveals where things really went wrong with John. Later, Leah is joined by Jeremy on stage.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: New Season, Old Wounds
programme.desc: Briana, frustrated by Luis' absence, tracks him down at a nightclub. After a major fight with her mum, things get even worse for Jade at Kloie's birthday party. (S10, ep1)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: About Last Night
programme.desc: Isaac makes a confession to Kailyn, prompting her to reconsider her custody agreement with Jo. Jade is forced to juggle single-parenthood while preparing for her beauty license exam. (S10, ep2)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Blood and Water
programme.desc: Briana takes an STI test after her night with Luis. Chelsea takes Aubree out for a mother-daughter day. Leah and Victoria visit her boyfriend in Costa Rica. (S10, ep3)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Hello From the Other Side
programme.desc: Jade graduates beauty school but family complications threaten her big day. Chelsea guides Aubree as she considers inviting Adam to the Father/Daughter dance. (S10, ep4)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Taking Charge
programme.desc: Briana confronts Luis about her STI test results. Jade is forced to support her family after they all lose their jobs. Aubree reconsiders the Father/Daughter dance. (S10, ep5)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Where Have You Been?
programme.desc: An explosive family brawl leaves Jade caught between Sean and her parents. DeVoin's family reappears in Briana and Nova's lives after being absent for years. (S10, ep6)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Dilemmas and Debacles
programme.desc: Jade is caught between her mum and Sean, but a drug test could reveal the truth. Leah is forced to balance her growing concerns for Ali and supporting her sister during childbirth. (S10, ep7)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Impossible Choice
programme.desc: Tensions erupt when Jade asks her parents to move out. After an x-ray, Leah grapples with the possibility that Ali's condition is progressing. Briana and family move into their new house. (S10, ep8)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Piece of Me
programme.desc: Kail celebrates Isaac's birthday while life-changing news weighs on her. Leah reveals secrets about her past. Chelsea tries to change Aubree's visitation agreement with Adam's parents. (S10, ep9)

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Camryn
programme.desc: Camryn met Cam when she was 14. His personality often put him at odds with her mum, but after finding out Camryn was pregnant and losing his job due to COVID, he was forced into moving in.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kash
programme.desc: Kash has been with boyfriend Nate for a year but struggles with his immaturity. Kash has to see if Nate can handle these new adult responsibilities or if he's just not ready to get serious.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kali
programme.desc: Kali and Auston were shocked to get pregnant so young. Auston moved in with Kali and while Kali's parents feel they've been forced to take him in, Auston's grandparents just want him home.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Selena
programme.desc: Selena's pregnancy came as a shock to her family, especially as they didn't approve of boyfriend Sean. Selena is forced to choose between her family and the father of her child.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Shelby
programme.desc: Shelby is preparing for the birth of her baby with her ex, who already has a baby with his girlfriend. Shelby is confident she can raise her baby on her own but the future looks uncertain.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kyla
programme.desc: Kyla has always had a complicated relationship with her mum, and things got worse when she fell pregnant. Kyla moved out to live with her aunt, while her boyfriend is living with Kyla's mum.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Abygail
programme.desc: Abygail is a gifted honours student who graduated high school two years early to pursue her bachelor's degree at age 16. So it was a shock to everyone when she found out she was pregnant.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Taylor
programme.desc: When Taylor found out she was expecting a baby with her ex Armani she was devastated. Especially since she and Armani were not even on speaking terms at the time.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Maci
programme.desc: Maci is the classic overachiever and cheerleader. Now that's all set to change as she's pregnant and planning to graduate early and move in with her boyfriend, Ryan.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Farrah
programme.desc: Meet Farrah, a popular high-school cheerleader. As if being pregnant isn't difficult enough, she is facing difficulties with the father of the baby, her friends and her mother.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Amber
programme.desc: In this episode, we follow Amber, who's expecting a baby with her boyfriend Gary. They decide to move in together but it's not always easy for these teen parents.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Ebony
programme.desc: Ebony and Josh both have dreams of joining the Air Force, but that may have to change now that Ebony is pregnant.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Whitney
programme.desc: Not only is 16 year old Whitney pregnant, but so is her mother! Watch her prepare to become both a big sister and a mother.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Catelynn
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler both have very dramatic home lives, and it gets even more complicated when Catelynn falls pregnant. They have some important choices to make, but can they cope?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Life After Labour
programme.desc: In this special episode Dr. Drew Pinsky discusses each girl's episode, issues and challenges and update us on what's going on now. There will also be questions from viewers and the audience.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Unseen Moments
programme.desc: Hosted by Dr. Drew. A look back at the undiscovered stories from season one.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jenelle
programme.desc: Jenelle, a North Carolina beach bunny who loves partying, realizes her long-distance boyfriend isn't coming back, and that she's too immature to raise a baby herself.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Nikkole
programme.desc: Nikki is a prankster princess whose posse of friends love her, but hate her boyfriend. Can she convince her friends and family that Josh is worthy of being a father to their son?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Chelsea
programme.desc: Popular high school senior Chelsea loves her school life and her boyfriend Adam. She thinks life will be the same after she gives birth, but instead learns this may not be the case.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Lori
programme.desc: Lori's parents want her to choose adoption, but as someone who was adopted herself, she doesn't want her baby to be haunted by all that's haunted her.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators discovers DNA that contradicts a murder case that was seemingly open and shut before.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Battle Scars
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators is called in to investigate the very recent murder of an underground hip-hop dancer.

programme.title: CSI: NY: It Happened to Me
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a software executive, the CSIs are exposed to the underground world of food splooshing.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Hammer Down (Crossover)
programme.desc: Las Vegas CSI Ray Langston comes to New York to help Mac and the CSI team try and save a hostage from a human trafficking ring.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators resumes their hunt for the Compass Killer after a body falls from the 59th street bridge.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Manhattanhenge
programme.desc: In the culmination of a multi-episode mystery, the CSI New York team of investigators uncovers the dark lair of the Compass Killer.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Happily Never After
programme.desc: A notorious hotel owner known for her meanness is found dead under an ice sculpture, and the clues to the death of a second woman who fell to her death onto a school bus can be found in the book "Peter Pan."

programme.title: CSI: New York: Personal Foul
programme.desc: As the search for the "Cabbie Killer" continues, riding a cab gets very deadly. The team must figure out how to keep New York City safe.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Veritas
programme.desc: Immediately following the previous season finale, the team is investigating the death of a woman named Lauren Salinas who is linked to the bank robbery. She turns out to be a friend of Flack's sister Samantha.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Page Turner
programme.desc: When two people turn up dead with radiation poisoning, it sparks an urgent investigation before it turns into a deadly outbreak in New York City when it's tracked down to a book at the NYC Library.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Turbulence
programme.desc: When an Air Marshal turns up dead on a flight on which Mac is a passenger, the victim it turns out, isn't a Marshal at all. The real Marshal was killed earlier and his ID stolen.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sex, Lies, and Silicone
programme.desc: When a prominent journalist named Ann Steele turns up dead at a street party, the investigation leads the team to a life-size silicone doll company.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Dead Inside
programme.desc: A man is found dead in a basement, but the house where the death occurred is found miles away on a barge in the East River. Meanwhile, Flack discovers that his sister lost her job and has a drinking problem.

programme.title: CSI: New York: My Name Is Mac Taylor
programme.desc: When two men who share the same name as detective Mac Taylor are killed, detective Taylor rounds up all the other Mac Taylors in New York and tries to figure out who will be the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Triangle
programme.desc: CSI investigates the death of a armored truck security guard, which appears to be related to a disturbance at a so-called "Bermuda Triangle" of electric activity near the Empire State Building.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Rush To Judgment
programme.desc: While investigating the death and dismemberment of a high school wrestling coach, detective Flack gets in trouble when a suspect dies in his custody.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Green Piece
programme.desc: An environmental terrorist group bombs the home of an electronics recycler, and his daughter is killed--but the daughter is part of the terrorist group. Meanwhile, Danny considers proposing to Lindsay again.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Communication Breakdown
programme.desc: CSI tries to figure who is responsible for the death of the chief of a Native American tribe who were some of the original inhabitants of Manhattan.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Prey
programme.desc: A murder victim turns out to be a violent stalker, and the killer may be one of his stalking victims who learned to cover her tracks by attending one of Bonasera's college seminars.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Past, Present and Murder
programme.desc: A man is killed when he falls out a window in media mogul Robert Dunbrook's building, but did Dunbrook throw him? During the investigation, Mac discovers that the case is connected to an earlier case involving a missing flash drive.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: If Looks Could Kill
programme.desc: When a male model is murdered, Horatio and the CSI team must enter the high stakes world of modeling in order to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Death Pool 100
programme.desc: After a celebrity is murdered at an A-list party, the CSIs uncover a counterfeit ring producing a hundred dollar bills. Horatio investigates.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Going Under
programme.desc: The team must investigate when Calleigh is run off the road into a canal, compromising crime scene evidence she just collected.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Death Eminent
programme.desc: After an entire neighborhood learns that they are being forced out of their homes, the local politician supporting eminent domain is murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Curse of the Coffin
programme.desc: The CSIs must investigate a strange case involving voodoo and are spooked when bizarre accidents start happening around the lab.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Darkroom
programme.desc: A kidnapping case becomes personal for Horatio and the CSI team when the victim unexpectedly turns out to be Boa Vista's sister.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Guerillas in the Mist
programme.desc: Three gunrunners are killed by a new high-tech weapon called "The Vaporizer." And after Horatio interviews the CEO of the defense contractor that made the weapon, he also turns up dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Raising Caine
programme.desc: The mother of Horatio's child surfaces and becomes a prime suspect in her husband's murder. She also comes under suspicion when the witness in Horatio's son's trial suddenly disappears before she can testify.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Tunnel Vision
programme.desc: The team finds a body in a sinkhole, which turns out to be related to an underground bank robbery. The case also involves an incriminating video of a wealthy businessman's daughter with a drug dealer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Down To The Wire
programme.desc: A notorious private investigator becomes a central figure in an investigation into a phony 911 call that ends in death, and he uses information he's gathered about Calleigh and Eric to get them thrown off the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: From The Grave
programme.desc: The team must find the connection between the two crime scenes: the killing of a drug dealer and the rape of an affluent family's housekeeper who happens to be pregnant.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: When a rich family is trapped on a burning yacht in shark-infested waters, the CSI's must investigate how it happened.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: 48 Hours To Life
programme.desc: Horatio and the team are trying to figure out how to free an innocent young man after a harsh interrogation with Frank Tripp sends him to jail.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Three-Way
programme.desc: Three suburban housewives on a girls' weekend in Miami are the prime suspects when the hotel's handsome pool boy is found murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Under Suspicion
programme.desc: The CSI team must race against time when all evidence in a murder case points to Horatio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Felony Flight
programme.desc: A convicted serial killer escapes after sabotaging an airplane that was flying him from New York to Miami, where he allegedly buried a body.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Nailed
programme.desc: The CSI team are called out to investigate the murder of a young woman who was about to sign her divorce papers.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Urban Hellraisers
programme.desc: Eric finds himself in the middle of a robbery while at the bank. The team soon learns that the bank robbery is part of a video game called "Urban Hellraisers" being played out in real life.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Shattered
programme.desc: A drug lord is gunned in his Coconut Grove mansion and a suspect arrested at the scene claims he sells marijuana to Delko. Rick Stetler, from Internal Affairs, investigates and the case quickly becomes personal when Horatio gets involved.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: The Score
programme.desc: The CSI team investigate the brutal murder of a man who was learning how to pick up women. Meanwhile, Horatio tries to help out Marisol, Delko's sister, who was arrested on drug charges.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Frozen Innocence
programme.desc: On a chilly morning in St. Louis, an 11 year old girl vanishes. Days later her body is found along an icy river bank. It’s a race against time for investigators who fear the killer will strike again.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: Summer of Terror (Part 1)
programme.desc: The Summer of 1985, the Night Stalker was on the loose in Los Angeles, and his crimes were vicious, random, and committed in the name of Satan. His victims ranged from toddlers to the elderly.
programme.sub-title: The Night Stalker: Summer of Terror (Part 1)

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: I Will Be Avenged (Part 2)
programme.desc: The Summer of 1985, the Night Stalker was on the loose in Los Angeles, and his crimes were vicious, random, and committed in the name of Satan. His victims ranged from toddlers to the elderly.
programme.sub-title: The Night Stalker: I Will Be Avenged (Part 2)

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-ed Killer: The Murder Capital of the World (Part 1)
programme.desc: Santa Cruz, California, is a beachside paradise, until female students begin to go missing. A frantic public live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed “The Coed Killer” to strike again.
programme.sub-title: The Co-ed Killer: The Murder Capital of the World (Part 1)

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: Santa Cruz, California, is a beachside paradise, until female students begin to go missing. A frantic public live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed “The Coed Killer” to strike again.
programme.sub-title: The Co-ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: Palo Alto
programme.desc: In 2009, a murder mystery would strike the trendy city of Palo Alto when beautiful real estate broker Jennifer Schipsi was found strangled to death and set ablaze in her home.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When police find 24-year-old Patrick Ray with a gunshot to the temple, the scene has all the telltale signs of suicide. But Lt. Joe Kenda's instinct says otherwise.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Rains Down
programme.desc: Restaurant worker Sharon Coleman is murdered in a hail of large caliber gunfire. Kenda must break through a web of lies to hunt down one of the most dangerous criminal masterminds he’s ever faced.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she’s been sold on the black market… or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Prayer for the Dying
programme.desc: A mother of two is found dead in the most expensive part of Colorado Springs, leaving Lt. Joe Kenda stumped—until he looks into her personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When a tip comes in suggesting foul play on a 71yr old man, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My First Case
programme.desc: In his first case with the homicide unit, rookie burglary detective Joe Kenda volunteers to work a bloody multi-victim shooting deemed “unsolvable” by the veterans.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Justified
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down, leading Lt. Joe Kenda to delve into his troubled past and his connection to the world of rare coins.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Run for your Life
programme.desc: A slain body of a marathon runner is found just hours before a big race. With the help of a trusted K-9 officer, Kenda sets off to find the killer himself before he strikes again.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Tighten the Screws
programme.desc: When young Iraq War veteran Curtis Ashley ends up dead, Lt. Joe Kenda has to solve the slaying of a seemingly innocent victim using his keen awareness of the criminal mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Magic Bullet
programme.desc: A hard-working father of two is shot in the head just steps from a notorious strip club. The case is stuck in neutral until Kenda uncovers a conspiracy organized by an unlikely triggerman.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My, My, Merry Christmas
programme.desc: Donald Ott is found shot to death, friends tell police he didn’t have an enemy in the world. But when Lt. Joe Kenda speaks with family, he learns of a relative who might hold the key to the mystery.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent.

programme.title: The Millers: Giving The Bird
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and Nathan, Debbie, and Adam take Mikayla trick-or-treating to the house of an old woman who everyone in the neighborhood thinks is a witch.

programme.title: The Millers: Driving Miss Crazy
programme.desc: When Nathan gets frustrated after he's forced to drive Carol around town for errands once again, he demands that she either learn how to drive or find another chauffeur.

programme.title: The Millers: Internet Dating
programme.desc: When Nathan helps Carol set up her profile on an Internet dating site, he and Ray get so excited about one of her potential suitors, they start corresponding with him, pretending to be Carol.

programme.title: The Millers: You're In Trouble
programme.desc: When Nathan learns why Debbie is Tom's favorite child instead of him, he decides it's time to fill his parents in on some of Debbie's childhood secrets.

programme.title: The Millers: The Talk
programme.desc: When Carol finds out that Tom never had "the talk" with Nathan about the birds and the bees, she insists it's not too late to gather the family together and do it now.

programme.title: The Millers: Carol's Parents Are Coming to Town
programme.desc: When Carol's overbearing mother and father announce they're coming to visit for Christmas, Carol recruits Nate and Tom to cover up their failed relationships and present a happy facade.
programme.sub-title: Carol's Parents Are Coming to Town

programme.title: The Millers: Dear Diary
programme.desc: When Debbie suspects Nathan and Carol of secretly reading her diary, she and Adam plant a fake entry about Tom in order to prove it. Ernie Hudson guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: Miller's Mind
programme.desc: Nathan learns to appreciate Carol's incessant rants after he mimics one of them at work and is rewarded with his own news segment to complain on the air.

programme.title: The Millers: Carol's Surprise
programme.desc: Nathan is determined to finally, just once, surprise the "unsurpriseable" Carol on her birthday. Brandon Routh guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: You Betcha
programme.desc: Nathan asks Tom to spend the weekend with him in the hopes of finding something they have in common.

programme.title: The Millers: Bahama Mama
programme.desc: Just as Nathan begins to unwind on his vacation in the Bahamas, Carol's surprise appearance gets him riled up all over again until they meet Ganja Pete.

programme.title: The Millers: Tomlandia
programme.desc: When Nathan pitches a children's show to his boss, Ed Dolan, based on Tom's imaginary comic book, Tom has an adverse reaction to the tweaks made to his cherished world. Jeffrey Tambor guest stars.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly represents Nicki in her divorce, but lets her own history with marriage get in the way. Phil tries to prove he’s not getting older by dating a much younger woman.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly joins a grief support group to meet a man. Stuart and Haskell help prepare Phil for a talk show appearance after he develops a lisp.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell dates a beautiful woman who Phil is convinced is really a man. Stuart is filled with guilt after he sleeps with a woman who thinks he’s a war hero.
programme.sub-title: An Officer and a Dental Man

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell’s estranged brother shows up and asks for one small favor: his kidney. Holly mentors a teenager who turns out to like Eden’s job more than hers.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly throws a birthday party for Stuart and Nicki, but her real motive is to impress a guy she's just met who's new in town. Nicki and Stuart's dad shows up and ruins everything.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell plans to attend a big event honoring him for his past bowling glory, but is quarantined with Phil and Stuart. Holly secretly rewrites Eden's college paper and almost destroys her dream.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: The gang attends a charity silent auction. Haskell wins a police ride-along. Phil wins dinner with his favorite sitcom TV Mom. Stuart and Holly are forced to share a cooking lesson with a celebrity chef.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly sneaks into a sorority Eden is pledging to find out why she was rejected years ago. Haskell turns the guys' apartment into a pretend AirBnB to attract a woman.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly, over the moon, introduces the gang to her new boyfriend, Congressman Charles Hayward, but they soon begin to question his motives.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly’s engagement to Congressman Charles Hayward is put in jeopardy when a scandalous photo of her lands in the newspaper. Haskell has an idea for a great new app, but needs an investor.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly's big day arrives. Haskell and Nicki, now business partners, strike it rich.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly is given a voice-activated operating system as a gift and gets way too attached to him. Haskell comes into money and uses it to control Phil and Stuart.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly, tired of all the drama that comes with dating, decides to only pursue men she’s not interested in. Haskell takes all his money out of the bank to show it off.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart recruits Phil for his a cappella group and Phil leads a rebellion. Haskell leaves Holly out of his will and she seeks revenge.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart’s sister Nicki comes back from her European vacation with a female lover. Holly, inspired by Nicki, decides to try dating women.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil’s stint on a movie set leads to romance with the female star. Holly struggles with having to fire someone for the first time.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil makes a big mistake on his first date with a movie star so Holly has to infiltrate the red carpet to bail him out. Stuart and Haskell compete over who can get the most Twitter followers.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly and Nicki plan a girls’ night out, but wind up competing for the same guy. Phil realizes dating a movie star is much more difficult than he imagined.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil and Stuart have a fight with Haskell and he moves out. Holly, desperate to keep them all together, sends Phil and Stuart to bring him home.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly accidently convinces Stuart to quit his dental practice and buy a restaurant. Haskell, sick of paying alimony, tries to persuade his ex wife Margo to marry her fiancé.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Make Room For Dani
programme.desc: Oscar reluctantly agrees with his agent that it's time to shake things up on his radio show and allows Dani to have a bigger role after a rival host, Rich Eisen, taunts him.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: A Dinner Engagement
programme.desc: Felix attempts to reverse Emily's birthday curse and plans a nice dinner to celebrate with friends.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Chess Nuts
programme.desc: Oscar learns that Felix was a nationally ranked chess player as a child and convinces him to return to the game to make money.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Odd Man Out
programme.desc: Felix forces Oscar and Emily to go on a date to get to know each other better in the hope that they'll become friends.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Road Scholar
programme.desc: In an attempt to surprise Emily, Felix gets his learner's permit and enlists his friends to help him learn how to drive.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: All The Residents' Men
programme.desc: Oscar and Felix run a heated campaign for President of their building's tenants' association, but Oscar doesn't fully realize everything the position entails.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Ex-Factor
programme.desc: When Murph persuades Oscar to try online dating, Oscar finds himself on a blind date with Felix's ex-wife, Ashley (Christine Woods).

programme.title: The Odd Couple: London Calling
programme.desc: Oscar is forced to choose between his romantic plans with Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) and helping to save Felix's relationship as Emily decides to extend her stay in London.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Food Fight
programme.desc: When Oscar learns that his favorite hangout, Langford's, is in financial trouble, he impulsively asks Felix to help save it, without considering the disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 63
programme.desc: Twin sisters who lost their parents as pre-teens are chopped apart by finances and jealousy and Judge Rhonda must decode the anger over caring for a toddler to pull their sisterhood back together.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 95
programme.desc: A mother at the end of her rope drags her son in front of Judge Rhonda, hoping to get back the $1,100 he stole from her bank account.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 5
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda settles the score between twin models who can even fool their photographer.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 60
programme.desc: A tribute tattoo for her late father brings a grieving daughter and her tattoo artist cousin into Judge Rhonda's Courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A covid outbreak at her chicken factory job drives a young woman trying to protect her mom who suffers with MS into Judge Rhonda's court.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: She thought the sneaker deal with her cousin was a slam dunk, but when he held on to her bank card and kept charging new shoes she ran, like a full court press, to Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 33
programme.desc: Drag Queens married to each other face Judge Rhonda over a beautiful performance garment that just doesn't fit anymore.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A couple together for eight years share a son and a home, but when she finds out he has another child and other women Judge Rhonda is called into play.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 87
programme.desc: An estranged couple who can't even decide if they want to stay together bring their 5 year dispute to Judge Rhonda's Courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: When her brother's "linebacker" wife had him arrested for a tussel, this sister bailed him out and put him up for three months; Judge Rhonda handles the bill.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 78
programme.desc: When Dad's Bernese Mountain dog gives his son's nose a nasty bite, their strained relationship is put to the test in Judge Rhonda's court.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episdoe 50
programme.desc: Love at first sight in a sober living house got complicated; she found a new love and he sold her generator so Judge Rhonda must generate a simple solution.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 130
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda confronts a marriage on-the-rocks with accusations of cheating on both sides, drug-use and a baby caught in the middle.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 48
programme.desc: When a man brings his transgender fiance into court, Judge Rhonda confronts his mom who may be the cause of their dispute.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 24
programme.desc: A housing situation that was "tore up from the floor up" brings a pair who lived together into Judge Rhonda's Courtroom

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 17
programme.desc: Her son's bad Marriage in London causes a mother to drag him home; now she wants Judge Rhonda to make the young man pay her back.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 93
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda is shocked by a DJ who claims that when a cousin who has been doing her hair since middle school, braided her head so tightly that her scalp was bleeding and scabby, she suffered hair-loss and now has a big bald spot.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 23
programme.desc: A Daughter faces off with her Father in Judge Rhonda's court over a loan he says he can never repay.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 99
programme.desc: It is no laughing matter for Judge Rhonda when a comedian won't pay her cousin back for a $5,000 loan after a smash and grab car thief took her cash and gun.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 75
programme.desc: A designer handbag trampled at a party drags two close cousins into court where Judge Rhonda must figure out if the purse is real or a fake.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 51
programme.desc: Sisters appear before Judge Rhonda with an allegation of credit card theft and a polygraph test helps the Judge uncover the truth.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 21
programme.desc: Cousins who live together can't agree over groceries and toilet tissue, Judge Rhonda has to unwrap this mess.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 128
programme.desc: Brothers from a big musical family slam into a sour note over a broken car, broken tools, and ask Judge Rhonda to fix practically everything but the kitchen sink in the house they share.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Their mothers were sisters who didn't speak to each other, and now these cousins are not speaking over money one claims the other spent on paying men to sleep with her; Judge Rhonda is on the case.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 79
programme.desc: Growing up in foster care, she survived tragedy and tried to take care of her baby brother; now she needs Judge Rhonda's help to make him take his future seriously and pay her back.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A two-month courtship led to an eight-month marriage which brought two old friends into Judge Rhonda's court fighting about stimulus money and a child custody lawyer.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A couple who share seven children and a thriving protein shake business come infront of Judge Rhonda to solve the mystery of a broken Playstation.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 104
programme.desc: A celebrity wardrobe stylist says his "influencer" cousin failed to pay for a photoshoot he pulled together and Judge Rhonda must decide who has been taken to the cleaners.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 55
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda confronts a family in crisis with a mother trying to protect her daughter from the man she lives with; violence and heartbreak are consuming this family.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 103
programme.desc: They met when she was 16, now thirteen years and three children later, their marriage is on the rocks because he parties and pursues his dreams, so she presents Judge Rhonda with the support contract she wants enforced

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 97
programme.desc: Sisters with a terrific relationship are torn apart by a two-year old being a toddler, and Judge Rhonda calls a foul on their bickering.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 37
programme.desc: Two comedians with the same last name find out they are halfbrothers when they happen to work together, but a rude joke about one of their mothers brings them into Judge Rhonda's courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 137
programme.desc: Sisters who grew up in separate households became "petty partners" as adults are in Judge Rhonda's courtroom squabbling over a girl trip to Puerto Rico that went horribly wrong.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 76
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda faces the case of a man who thinks the rent and utilities he provided for his pregnant girlfriend because she could not work as an exotic dancer was a loan she should pay back.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 53
programme.desc: Her nephew, the make-up artist who specializes in gore, left her car a "bloody" mess after he hit a tree on the way to work and she wants Judge Rhonda to make him clean up the damage.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 29
programme.desc: An Exotic Dancer and her cousin the photographer sashay into Judge Rhonda's court at odds over who should pay for the pictures

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 150
programme.desc: Family squabbles can become destructive, especially when money is involved.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 57
programme.desc: A comedian claims his cousin the canibus festival promoter didn't pay for his performance; Judge Rhonda weeds through the facts for her verdict.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 41
programme.desc: When a Carpenter sees on social media that his cousin has been building her best life instead of paying him back he constructs a case for Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 133
programme.desc: A Fairy Tale romance goes horribly wrong when a former lover enters the picture and Judge Rhonda must solve the mystery of a birthstone engagement ring that is lost forever.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 4
programme.desc: In Judge Rhonda's Court cousins squabble over an expensive laptop that one claims fell out of the back of a rental SUV.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 28
programme.desc: Mother and Daughter face off in Judge Rhonda's courtroom over a secret breast augmentation surgery.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 64
programme.desc: When an older sister became the legal "mother" for her two young sisters, she and her husband paid all of their bills; now that one is a grown exotic dancer money makes them face Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Anatomy Of A Lye
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate when a man's body, which has been doused with lye, is found buried in a park.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Cross-Jurisdictions
programme.desc: Grissom and his crew handle their highest profile case to date when the city's former chief of detectives is slain execution-style in his house following a wild party.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Hunger Artist
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when the body of an unidentified young woman is discovered stuffed in an overturned shopping cart near a freeway underpass.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Revenge Is Best Served Cold
programme.desc: Catherine and Nick investigate street racing after one of the drivers is found dead out in the desert at an abandoned airstrip.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Accused Is Entitled
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a crime involving a popular actor.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Let The Seller Beware
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the murder of a wealthy couple who are found outside their home, which was up for sale.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: A Little Murder
programme.desc: A dwarf is found dead, hanged in an auditorium during an annual convention for little people. Working on a case of murder during a home invasion, Catherine is attacked by the perpetrator while processing the scene.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Abra Cadaver
programme.desc: During a magic show, a female participant really disappears during a disappearing act. Nick and Catherine investigates the death of a rock star found on his tour bus with a needle stuck in his arm.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Fight Night
programme.desc: When boxing favourite LaRoi Steele dies during the Fight Night against Javier Molina, Grissom investigates for a possible murder. Meanwhile, Nick is assigned to work solo on a jewelry heist.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Snuff
programme.desc: A murder is caught on tape. With no body or a crime scene, Sara, Warrick and Catherine must get as much information as possible from the grainy 16 mm film. Grissom and Nick must brave a colony of fire ants to recover a body.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Blood Lust
programme.desc: A taxi driver accidentally runs over a teenage boy. He is later brutally beaten by a gang who thinks he is running away. Grissom and Sara works on the case and finds that the boy was dead prior to being hit from a stab wound.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: High And Low
programme.desc: A body falls out of the sky, literally. The cause of death is suffocation but the body bears no signs of strangulation.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Random Acts Of Violence
programme.desc: Matt Phelps sends his two kids to bed when, out of the blue, there is a drive-by shooting and his daughter Aimee is shot and killed in her bed. Grissom learns that Phelps is Warrick's mentor and friend.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: One Hit Wonder
programme.desc: When Joanne Crooks is assaulted in her home, Catherine, Grissom, Nick, Warrick and Capt. Brass assume the investigation. They find fingerprints on the windows and they learn that the criminal is escalating in his crimes.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Crash And Burn
programme.desc: An elderly lady drives her car recklessly into a café for no apparent reason. Meanwhile, a wife dies of carbon monoxide poisoning while her husband does not even though he was sleeping right next to her.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Precious Metal
programme.desc: A badly decomposed body of a man is found in a chemical waste barrel. The markings on the barrel indicates that it came from a warehouse, now used as an arena for specially-built remote-controlled robots to destroy each other.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: A Night At The Movies
programme.desc: A man is found stabbed to death in an art house cinema while a young shooting victim is found in a storage room with a bizarrely wide bullet hole pattern.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Last Laugh
programme.desc: While performing on the stage, the comedian Dougie Max dies. Grissom, Catherine and Capt. Brass investigate the conclude that he was poisoned by the expensive bottled water Innoko.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Forever
programme.desc: When a private jet lands after a party, they find the trainer Lori Hutchins dead apparently stomped by the horse in the cargo bay. Grissom, Catherine, Nick and Capt. Brass investigate the case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Inside The Box
programme.desc: A team of robbers heist the First Monument Bank and Detective Cyrus Lockwood is shot and murdered. The team investigate the case and find that the thieves wanted a specific safety deposit box in the vault.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Released to Kill
programme.desc: Fourteen days after being released from prison, Matthew Williams, a prolific offender with a long history of violence, viciously attacked a young woman.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Released to Kill
programme.desc: A man is stabbed while helping a neighbour who's being burgled and he tragically bleeds to death. The killer is murderer Ian McLoughlin, out on day release from prison.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Released to Kill
programme.desc: Marvyn Iheanacho had only been out of prison for six months before he killed a child. This terrible incident raised questions as to how the child ended up in Iheanacho's care.

programme.title: Voice of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A fraternal bond can be unbreakable, with secrets and codes based on favourite films and silly plans. What happens when a body is found and the codes are used for murder?

programme.title: Voice of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Jennifer Pan witnessed the murder of her mother and the attempted murder of her father. But when he wakes from a coma, her father has a very different story to tell.

programme.title: Voice of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: When a criminal on probation embarks on a killing spree of ex-lovers, police try to get ahead of the man who will later insist that he is a victim and that society is to blame.

programme.title: Voice of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: How do the FBI find a killer with no victim or geographic profile and who covers his trail with counter forensics. And if they can find him, how would they prove responsibility?

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: When a string of elderly people were found dead in their beds across south London, New Scotland Yard detectives realised they had a serial killer on their hands.

programme.title: Murder Book
programme.desc: After a teenager is killed by a speedboat user while fishing, two Game Wardens from Texas become unlikely murder investigators.

programme.title: Murder Book
programme.desc: A veteran investigator is brought out of retirement to close the case of a policeman who was murdered.

programme.title: Murder Book
programme.desc: Investigators join forces with the family of a missing retiree in order to unravel the mystery of his disappearance. They eventually bring his killers to justice.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Kimberly Parker is convicted of masterminding the kidnapping and murder of her estranged husband. She is sentenced to 99 years in prison.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Twila Busby and her two sons are found dead in their home in Texas. Her boyfriend Hank Skinner is found guilty, but he claims he is innocent.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: An elderly lady and her care taker are murdered. Earl Linebaugh and Melissa Harris are sentenced to life with no parole, but Melissa says she's a victim too.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: 21-year-old Ernesto Martinez had been seemingly living happily with 59-year-old Barry Horn - until one of them was found brutally stabbed to death at their home.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: In 1986 the body of Patrice LaBlanc surfaces in a Texas Lake. She's been stabbed 39 times by her drag queen boyfriend Cliff Youens. Now he confesses to his crimes.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Baby Dylan was 3 months old when his mum shook him to death. She claims it was an accident but was found guilty of murder and sentenced to 50 years.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: It took police 10 years to unravel a convoluted murder-for-hire plot involving three junkies and a callous hit man, which resulted in a life imprisonment sentence.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Electrician Larry Swearingen is found guilty of the murder of 19 year-old college student Melissa Trotter and now sits on death row. He says he didn't do it.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Tyra Whitney killed her daughter Tashira's boyfriend, LeMarcus Bell,with a hammer. LeMarcus died from his injuries shortly, and Tyra faced incarceration.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Stephen Schulhoff was found beaten to death. His daughter Courtney and her boyfriend are found guilty and sentenced to life with no parole, but it's not clear who was responsible.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: When Michael Barber finds his wife Susan in bed with another man, she realises she has to take drastic measures to stop him leaving, but no one could suspect how far she would go.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Brian Bishop was shot and killed in a shoot-out with an armed robber as they returned to a stash point piled high with cash stolen from multiple post offices along the coastline.
programme.sub-title: Murdered in the Line of Duty

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Just before Christmas 1994, heavily tattooed Jason Mitchell strangled pensioners Arthur and Shirley Wilson, before returning to his father's house and dismembering his body.

programme.title: Weeks Of War: Episode 7
programme.desc: It's spring 1944 and on the Eastern Front, the momentum is firmly with allies as the war moves into its final, violent act.

programme.title: Weeks Of War: Episode 8
programme.desc: By January 1945, it seemed the end of the war was in sight - but challenges still loomed on the Eastern Front, in the Pacific and in Western Europe.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: Rise of The Bomber
programme.desc: Rise of the Bomber: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain as the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: War Without Boundaries
programme.desc: War Without Boundaries: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain as the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.desc: By Night & By Day: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain, and the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: Terror of The World

programme.title: The Plane That Led D-Day: Part 1
programme.desc: On 5 June 1944, a C-47 paratrooper aircraft nicknamed 'That’s All, Brother' took off from England to drop Allied fighting men into Normandy. But, post-War she disappeared. A chance discovery in 2015 led a scramble to save the aircraft.

programme.title: The Plane That Led D-Day: Part 2
programme.desc: On 5 June 1944, a C-47 paratrooper aircraft nicknamed 'That’s All, Brother' took off from England to drop Allied fighting men into Normandy. But, post-War she disappeared. A chance discovery in 2015 led a scramble to save the aircraft.

programme.title: The Plane That Led D-Day: Part 3
programme.desc: On 5 June 1944, a C-47 paratrooper aircraft nicknamed 'That’s All, Brother' took off from England to drop Allied fighting men into Normandy. But, post-War she disappeared. A chance discovery in 2015 led a scramble to save the aircraft.

programme.title: Memories of D-Day
programme.desc: 6 June 1944: Operation Overlord begins. Discover D-Day through the eyes of the British Soldiers. In this film, photographs collected by four soldiers allow us to better understand the battle that occurred while reconquering occupied territory.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Ranged Weapons
programme.desc: Ranged weapons guarantee a warrior's best chance of survival. International experts survey history’s most important ranged weapons, from the Roman spear and the English longbow, right up to the futuristic railgun.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Attack From Above
programme.desc: Examining how warfare entered a new dimension as attacks from the skies became possible with weapons from incendiary arrows to drones.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Close Combat
programme.desc: Weapons experts test the physical and psychological impact of close combat weapons - the Roman short sword, the medieval war hammer and the bayonet.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Weapons For All
programme.desc: From the crossbow to the Kalashnikov to 3D-printed firearms, weaponry designed for everyone can offer a decisive advantage in warfare.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Faster Than The Enemy
programme.desc: In spectacular experiments, a team of international experts presents the most significant cases in the history of weapons where speed has made a decisive difference.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Power Of Destruction, The
programme.desc: New weapons with devastating force shape the wars of the 20th century. International experts test the catastrophic effects of the three most destructive weapons of our time: the machine gun, hand grenade and tank.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: War At Sea
programme.desc: A look at key maritime weapons such as the secret super-weapon that kept Constantinople safe for centuries, the thunderous force of a ship's cannon, and the deadly torpedo.
